title: NotebookLM Changed Completely: Here's What Matters (in 2026)
summary: Jeff Su reviews NotebookLM's new interface featuring a three-column layout and Studio panel tools for generating reports, slide decks, infographics, mind maps, data tables, video overviews, quizzes, flashcards, and audio overviews. The content demonstrates workflows for converting raw sources into finished outputs across multiple formats.
